test_1_onboarding.name: New Developer Onboarding
test_1_onboarding.details: The system successfully provided necessary information for new developers to get started.

test_2_change_impact.name: Change Impact Analysis
test_2_change_impact.details: The system accurately analyzed the impact of changes on the existing codebase.

test_3_mystery_code.name: Mystery Code Explanation
test_3_mystery_code.details: The system provided a clear and concise explanation of the mystery code.

test_4_technology_decision.name: Technology Decision Query
test_4_technology_decision.details: The system provided relevant information to support technology decisions.

test_5_unclear_question.name: Unclear Question Handling
test_5_unclear_question.details: The system failed to provide a clear response to an unclear question, instead providing a generic error message.

known_issues: Error handling can be more robust
recommendations: Implement a more advanced natural language processing algorithm to improve unclear question handling
Enhance error handling to provide more informative error messages
